arts.sum: Utrecht's hopes of qualifying for the Champions League face a significant test on Sunday as they travel to Koning Willem II Stadion to take on Willem II, who are striving to avoid falling into the rel...

arts.ttl: Preview: Willem II vs. FC Utrecht - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Eredivisie clash between Willem II and FC Utrecht, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
